name: Back center column
notes: Back main frame column, paired with piece 4 (front). Same axle-hole pattern as piece 4. Connection split (e–h here, a–d on piece 4) is an assumption from the ambiguous 'each carries a₂₉ … h₂₉' phrasing in Panel D — to be confirmed during the Inkscape hand-edit pass (M1 task 1.5). f₂₅/g₂₅ connections will WARN until piece 25 (plate C) has a sidecar.
